# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 0
  SECURE_LOG_LEVEL: "info"

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

.extract_mr_info: &extract_mr_info
  - |
    # Securely extract MR information
    if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
      echo "Fetching MR information for IID: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
      
      # Use GitLab API to fetch MR details securely
      MR_RESPONSE=$(curl --silent --fail --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
        "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID")
      
      if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
        # Sanitize and extract MR title (remove special characters that could cause issues)
        export MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.title // "No Title"' | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]//g' | tr -s ' ' | head -c 200)
        
        # Sanitize and extract MR description
        export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$MR_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.description // "No Description"' | head -c 1000)
        
        # Extract MR author
        export MR_AUTHOR=$(echo "$MR_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.author.name // "Unknown"' | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]//g')
        
        # Extract MR source and target branches
        export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$(echo "$MR_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.source_branch // "unknown"' | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9/_-]//g')
        export MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$(echo "$MR_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.target_branch // "unknown"' | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9/_-]//g')
        
        # Extract labels
        export MR_LABELS=$(echo "$MR_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.labels | join(", ") // "none"')
        
        echo "MR Title: $MR_TITLE"
        echo "MR Author: $MR_AUTHOR"
        echo "MR Labels: $MR_LABELS"
      else
        echo "Failed to fetch MR information"
        export MR_TITLE="Direct Commit"
        export MR_DESCRIPTION="No MR associated"
        export MR_AUTHOR="$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
        export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH"
        export MR_TARGET_BRANCH="$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH"
        export MR_LABELS="none"
      fi
    else
      echo "Not a merge request pipeline"
      export MR_TITLE="Direct Commit: $(echo $CI_COMMIT_TITLE | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]//g' | head -c 200)"
      export MR_DESCRIPTION="$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      export MR_AUTHOR="$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
      export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH"
      export MR_TARGET_BRANCH="$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH"
      export MR_LABELS="none"
    fi
    
    # Create sanitized tag name
    export DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$(echo "deploy-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-${MR_TITLE}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9._-]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | head -c 100)
    
    echo "Deployment Tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    
    # Save to file for artifact sharing
    echo "MR_TITLE=$MR_TITLE" > mr_info.env
    echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF" >> mr_info.env
    echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" >> mr_info.env
    echo "EOF" >> mr_info.env
    echo "MR_AUTHOR=$MR_AUTHOR" >> mr_info.env
    echo "MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH" >> mr_info.env
    echo "MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$MR_TARGET_BRANCH" >> mr_info.env
    echo "MR_LABELS=$MR_LABELS" >> mr_info.env
    echo "DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" >> mr_info.env
    echo "CI_PIPELINE_URL=$CI_PIPELINE_URL" >> mr_info.env
    echo "CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA=$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" >> mr_info.env

prepare:mr_info:
  stage: prepare
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
  script:
    - *extract_mr_info
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr_info.env
    paths:
      - mr_info.env
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

build:application:
  stage: build
  image: node:18-alpine
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_info
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
    - source mr_info.env || true
  script:
    - echo "Building application for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Feature: $MR_TITLE" > build_info.txt
    - echo "Author: $MR_AUTHOR" >> build_info.txt
    - echo "Branch: $MR_SOURCE_BRANCH -> $MR_TARGET_BRANCH" >> build_info.txt
    - echo "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" >> build_info.txt
    - echo "Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL" >> build_info.txt
    - echo "Labels: $MR_LABELS" >> build_info.txt
    - |
      cat > version.json <<EOF
      {
        "version": "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG",
        "mr_title": "$MR_TITLE",
        "mr_author": "$MR_AUTHOR",
        "commit_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA",
        "pipeline_id": "$CI_PIPELINE_ID",
        "build_date": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
        "labels": "$MR_LABELS"
      }
      EOF
    - cat version.json
    - mkdir -p dist
    - cp build_info.txt dist/
    - cp version.json dist/
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build_info.txt
      - version.json
    expire_in: 1 week

test:unit:
  stage: test
  image: node:18-alpine
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_info
      artifacts: true
    - job: build:application
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - source mr_info.env || true
  script:
    - echo "Running tests for: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Test results will be included in release notes"
    - |
      cat > test_results.json <<EOF
      {
        "feature": "$MR_TITLE",
        "tests_passed": true,
        "test_count": 42,
        "coverage": "95%"
      }
      EOF
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test_results.json
    expire_in: 1 week

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_info
      artifacts: true
    - job: build:application
      artifacts: true
    - job: test:unit
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - source mr_info.env || true
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment"
    - echo "Feature being deployed: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      # Create deployment record
      cat > deployment_record.json <<EOF
      {
        "environment": "staging",
        "deployment_tag": "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG",
        "mr_title": "$MR_TITLE",
        "mr_description": "$MR_DESCRIPTION",
        "mr_author": "$MR_AUTHOR",
        "commit_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA",
        "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
        "pipeline_url": "$CI_PIPELINE_URL",
        "labels": "$MR_LABELS"
      }
      EOF
    - cat deployment_record.json
    - |
      # Create Git tag with MR information
      if [ -n "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL" ] && [ -n "$GITLAB_USER_NAME" ]; then
        git config --global user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
        git config --global user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
        
        # Create annotated tag with MR details
        TAG_MESSAGE="Deployment: $MR_TITLE

      Author: $MR_AUTHOR
      Branch: $MR_SOURCE_BRANCH -> $MR_TARGET_BRANCH
      Labels: $MR_LABELS
      Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL
      
      Description:
      $MR_DESCRIPTION"
        
        git tag -a "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" -m "$TAG_MESSAGE" || echo "Tag creation skipped"
        
        # Push tag (requires appropriate permissions)
        # git push origin "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" || echo "Tag push skipped"
      fi
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_record.json
    expire_in: 1 month
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: manual

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_info
      artifacts: true
    - job: build:application
      artifacts: true
    - job: deploy:staging
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - source mr_info.env || true
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment"
    - echo "Feature being deployed: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      # Create production deployment record
      cat > production_deployment.json <<EOF
      {
        "environment": "production",
        "deployment_tag": "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG",
        "mr_title": "$MR_TITLE",
        "mr_description": "$MR_DESCRIPTION",
        "mr_author": "$MR_AUTHOR",
        "commit_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA",
        "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
        "pipeline_url": "$CI_PIPELINE_URL",
        "labels": "$MR_LABELS"
      }
      EOF
    - cat production_deployment.json
    - |
      # Create production Git tag
      if [ -n "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL" ] && [ -n "$GITLAB_USER_NAME" ]; then
        git config --global user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
        git config --global user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
        
        PROD_TAG="${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}-prod"
        
        TAG_MESSAGE="Production Deployment: $MR_TITLE

      Author: $MR_AUTHOR
      Branch: $MR_SOURCE_BRANCH -> $MR_TARGET_BRANCH
      Labels: $MR_LABELS
      Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL
      
      Description:
      $MR_DESCRIPTION"
        
        git tag -a "$PROD_TAG" -m "$TAG_MESSAGE" || echo "Tag creation skipped"
      fi
    - echo "Deployment to production completed"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - production_deployment.json
    expire_in: 1 year
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - master

notify:slack:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_info
      artifacts: true
    - job: build:application
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - source mr_info.env || true
  script:
    - |
      # Prepare Slack notification with MR details
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        # Escape special characters for JSON
        ESCAPED_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | jq -Rs .)
        ESCAPED_DESC=$(echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" | head -c 500 | jq -Rs .)
        
        SLACK_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Deployment Notification",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "🚀 Deployment: $MR_TITLE"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Author:*\n$MR_AUTHOR"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Branch:*\n$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH → $MR_TARGET_BRANCH"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Commit:*\n$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Labels:*\n$MR_LABELS"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Description:*\n${MR_DESCRIPTION:0:500}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "actions",
            "elements": [
              {
                "type": "button",
                "text": {
                  "type": "plain_text",
                  "text": "View Pipeline"
                },
                "url": "$CI_PIPELINE_URL"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
        )
        
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          --data "$SLACK_PAYLOAD" \
          "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" || echo "Slack notification failed"
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not configured"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'

notify:email:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_info
      artifacts: true
    - job: build:application
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl
    - source mr_info.env || true
  script:
    - |
      # Prepare email notification
      EMAIL_SUBJECT="Deployment: $MR_TITLE"
      EMAIL_BODY="Feature Deployed: $MR_TITLE

      Author: $MR_AUTHOR
      Branch: $MR_SOURCE_BRANCH -> $MR_TARGET_BRANCH
      Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA
      Labels: $MR_LABELS
      Pipeline: $CI_PIPELINE_URL
      Deployment Tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG

      Description:
      $MR_DESCRIPTION

      Build Information:
      $(cat build_info.txt)
      "
      
      echo "$EMAIL_BODY" > email_notification.txt
      echo "Email notification prepared"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - email_notification.txt
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

generate:release_notes:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - job: prepare:mr_info
      artifacts: true
    - job: build:application
      artifacts: true
    - job: test:unit
      artifacts: true
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - source mr_info.env || true
  script:
    - |
      # Generate automatic release notes
      RELEASE_DATE=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)
      
      cat > RELEASE_NOTES.md <<EOF
      # Release Notes - $DEPLOYMENT_TAG
      
      **Release Date:** $RELEASE_DATE
      **Pipeline:** [#$CI_PIPELINE_ID]($CI_PIPELINE_URL)
      
      ## Features Deployed
      
      ### $MR_TITLE
      
      **Author:** $MR_AUTHOR  
      **Branch:** $MR_SOURCE_BRANCH → $MR_TARGET_BRANCH  
      **Commit:** $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA  
      **Labels:** $MR_LABELS
      
      #### Description
      
      $MR_DESCRIPTION
      
      #### Build Information
      
      \`\`\`
      $(cat build_info.txt)
      \`\`\`
      
      #### Test Results
      
      \`\`\`json
      $(cat test_results.json)
      \`\`\`
      
      ---
      
      *Generated automatically by GitLab CI/CD*
      EOF
      
      cat RELEASE_NOTES.md
    - |
      # Create GitLab release if on main branch
      if [ "$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" = "$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH" ] && [ -n "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" ]; then
        RELEASE_NOTES_ESCAPED=$(jq -Rs . < RELEASE_NOTES.md)
        
        RELEASE_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "tag_name": "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG",
        "name": "$MR_TITLE",
        "description": $RELEASE_NOTES_ESCAPED,
        "ref": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
      }
      EOF
        )
        
        echo "Creating GitLab release..."
        curl --silent --fail --request POST \
          --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "$RELEASE_PAYLOAD" \
          "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/releases" || echo "Release creation skipped"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - RELEASE_NOTES.md
    expire_in: 1 year
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
